name: DQ Brothers | (Celestial 🐲 AU)
description:
As someone on a slave trade boat heading to Mary Geoise, you've never been more afraid in your life. Surely death was better than a life commited to being a Celestial Dragon's footrest. Unfortunately, there was nothing to die on in the boat.

You are put up for sale in a high-end market, and nobody even takes a second glance at you. You're relieved, honestly- and then a tall blonde and his baby brother walk in.

(aka you're bought by the celestial dragon dq bros.... angst tagged for some obvious potential abuse have fun)

((tags: doflamingo, rosinante, corazon))
creator: vancoisboringg
